name: IdsRcvdIncmSbsdyDtlRowCntBal

text.value: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.rcvdincmsbsdy_TMP_IdsRcvdIncmSbsdyDtlRowCntBal;WITH cte AS ( SELECT SRC.CMS_ENR_PAYMT_UNIQ_KEY AS SRC_CMS_ENR_PAYMT_UNIQ_KEY,SRC.CMS_ENR_PAYMT_AMT_SEQ_NO AS SRC_CMS_ENR_PAYMT_AMT_SEQ_NO,SRC.RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_DTL_PAYMT_TYP_CD AS SRC_RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_DTL_PAYMT_TYP_CD,SRC.RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_ACCT_ACTVTY_CD AS SRC_RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_ACCT_ACTVTY_CD,SRC.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AS SRC_SRC_SYS_CD_SK,TRGT.CMS_ENR_PAYMT_UNIQ_KEY AS TRGT_CMS_ENR_PAYMT_UNIQ_KEY,TRGT.CMS_ENR_PAYMT_AMT_SEQ_NO AS TRGT_CMS_ENR_PAYMT_AMT_SEQ_NO,TRGT.RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_DTL_PAYMT_TYP_CD AS TRGT_RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_DTL_PAYMT_TYP_CD,TRGT.RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_ACCT_ACTVTY_CD AS TRGT_RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_ACCT_ACTVTY_CD,TRGT.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AS TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.B_RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_DTL AS SRC FULL OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_DTL AS TRGT ON SRC.CMS_ENR_PAYMT_UNIQ_KEY = TRGT.CMS_ENR_PAYMT_UNIQ_KEY AND SRC.CMS_ENR_PAYMT_AMT_SEQ_NO = TRGT.CMS_ENR_PAYMT_AMT_SEQ_NO AND SRC.RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_DTL_PAYMT_TYP_CD = TRGT.RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_DTL_PAYMT_TYP_CD AND SRC.RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_ACCT_ACTVTY_CD = TRGT.RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_ACCT_ACTVTY_CD AND SRC.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = TRGT.SRC_SYS_CD_SK WHERE TRGT.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = @{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle} ) SELECT * INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.rcvdincmsbsdy_TMP_IdsRcvdIncmSbsdyDtlRowCntBal FROM cte; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.rcvdincmsbsdy_TMP_IdsRcvdIncmSbsdyDtlRowCntBal_Research SELECT * INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.rcvdincmsbsdy_TMP_IdsRcvdIncmSbsdyDtlRowCntBal_Research FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.rcvdincmsbsdy_TMP_IdsRcvdIncmSbsdyDtlRowCntBal WHERE SRC_CMS_ENR_PAYMT_UNIQ_KEY IS NULL OR SRC_CMS_ENR_PAYMT_AMT_SEQ_NO IS NULL OR SRC_RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_DTL_PAYMT_TYP_CD IS NULL OR SRC_RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_ACCT_ACTVTY_CD IS NULL OR SRC_SRC_SYS_CD_SK IS NULL OR TRGT_CMS_ENR_PAYMT_UNIQ_KEY IS NULL OR TRGT_CMS_ENR_PAYMT_AMT_SEQ_NO IS NULL OR TRGT_RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_DTL_PAYMT_TYP_CD IS NULL OR TRGT_RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_ACCT_ACTVTY_CD IS NULL OR TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK IS NULL; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.rcvdincmsbsdy_TMP_IdsRcvdIncmSbsdyDtlRowCntBal_Notify IF '@{pipeline().parameters.ToleranceCd}'='OUT' BEGIN SELECT 'ROW COUNT BALANCING FACETS - IDS RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_DTL IS OUT OF TOLERANCE' AS NOTIFICATION INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.rcvdincmsbsdy_TMP_IdsRcvdIncmSbsdyDtlRowCntBal_Notify END ELSE BEGIN SELECT TOP 0 'ROW COUNT BALANCING FACETS - IDS RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_DTL IS OUT OF TOLERANCE' AS NOTIFICATION INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.rcvdincmsbsdy_TMP_IdsRcvdIncmSbsdyDtlRowCntBal_Notify END

Description:
PROCESSING:  This job runs Balancing Full Outer Join SQL on RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_DTL and B_RCVD_INCM_SBSDY_DTL tables to find out if there are any fallouts.
